heading: Consultations on appointment and funding of rapid response labor panelists
label: 4649 Consultations on appointment and funding of rapid response labor panelists

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Interagency Labor Committee shall consult with the Labor Advisory Committee established under and the Advisory Committee for Trade Policy and Negotiations established under (or successor advisory committees) and the appropriate congressional committees with respect to the selection and appointment of candidates for the rapid response labor panelists described in Annex 31–A of the USMCA.section 2155(c)(1) of this titlesection 2155(b) of this title

children.heading: Funding
children.label: b Funding
children.text: The United States, in consultation with Mexico, shall provide adequate funding for rapid response labor panelists to carry out the responsibilities under the USMCA promptly and fully.
